response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for '[A]ddiction' and 'Life Will Change'. The video segment starts mid-verse for Hakos Baelz's performance of '[A]ddiction', so the beginning of the reference lyrics has been discarded. Ouro Kronii's performance of 'Life Will Change' follows an instrumental transition. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio waveforms, ensuring subtitles appear and disappear exactly with the singing. English translations maintain semantic continuity, especially during the fast-paced sections and the rap part of '[A]ddiction'.

subtitles.original: …まだ未練があるのね
subtitles.english: ...You still have lingering regrets, don't you?

subtitles.original: 本音は言わないほうが悩ましい
subtitles.english: It's more seductive if you don't tell the truth.

subtitles.original: 甘い言葉かけるよりもずっと愛おしい
subtitles.english: Much more precious than whispering sweet words.

subtitles.original: たまらなくなるほど 求めて離さないで
subtitles.english: Desire me so much you can't stand it, and don't let go.

subtitles.original: キスじゃ足りなくて いっそ殺して
subtitles.english: A kiss isn't enough, just kill me instead.

subtitles.original: Predilection あなたを手にかけて
subtitles.english: Predilection, laying my hands on you,

subtitles.original: Infatuation 呼吸さえ止めて
subtitles.english: Infatuation, even stopping my breath.

subtitles.original: Dedication このまま Addiction
subtitles.english: Dedication, just like this, Addiction,

subtitles.original: して まだたった一口で仕舞い
subtitles.english: and with just one taste, it's over.

subtitles.original: Predilection さあさ口をつけて
subtitles.english: Predilection, come on, put it to your lips,

subtitles.original: Infatuation そのまま飲み込んで
subtitles.english: Infatuation, swallow it as it is.

subtitles.original: Dedication すぐさま Addiction
subtitles.english: Dedication, immediately Addiction,

subtitles.original: して ほらたった一口 死ぬほど愛したいだけ
subtitles.english: look, just one taste, I just want to love you to death.

subtitles.original: 狂ったほどの愛情過多でいい
subtitles.english: It's fine to have a madly excessive love.

subtitles.original: あなたには私しかいない
subtitles.english: I'm the only one you have.

subtitles.original: 腐ったほどの愛情が足りない
subtitles.english: There's not enough of this rotten love.

subtitles.original: 私にはあなたしかいないなんて
subtitles.english: Saying that you're the only one I have.

subtitles.original: 運命を悟った この手掴んだ
subtitles.english: I realized our fate, and grabbed this hand.

subtitles.original: まだ未練があるのね また我儘
subtitles.english: You still have regrets, and you're being selfish again.

subtitles.original: 愛と名付けてまた支配する
subtitles.english: Naming it love, I'll dominate you again.

subtitles.original: あなたに溺れてく 息苦しいくらいに
subtitles.english: I'm drowning in you, to the point of suffocation.

subtitles.original: 侵食させて いっそ壊して
subtitles.english: Let it erode me, just break me instead.

subtitles.original: Predilection 私を手にかけて
subtitles.english: Predilection, laying your hands on me,

subtitles.original: Infatuation キスで口塞いで
subtitles.english: Infatuation, blocking my mouth with a kiss.

subtitles.original: Dedication まだまだ Addiction
subtitles.english: Dedication, more and more Addiction,

subtitles.original: して まだたった一言で溺愛
subtitles.english: and with just one word, doting love.

subtitles.original: Predilection 覗く眼差し込んで
subtitles.english: Predilection, with a piercing gaze,

subtitles.original: Infatuation 躊躇いなど捨てて
subtitles.english: Infatuation, cast aside all hesitation.

subtitles.original: Dedication すぐさま Addiction
subtitles.english: Dedication, immediately Addiction,

subtitles.original: して ほらたった一口 これで終わらせないで
subtitles.english: look, just one taste, don't let it end with this.

subtitles.original: Alas, alas, continue it further
subtitles.english: Alas, alas, continue it further,

subtitles.original: evolve more, my love, my love
subtitles.english: evolve more, my love, my love

subtitles.original: is besotted with you, your love, your love
subtitles.english: is besotted with you, your love, your love.

subtitles.original: continue to further evolve more, more, more
subtitles.english: Continue to further evolve more, more, more...

subtitles.original: これはあんた自身の仕業
subtitles.english: This is your own doing.

subtitles.original: あんたが言った通りの仕返し
subtitles.english: The retaliation just as you described.

subtitles.original: 私たちはただ愛されたかっただけだったのよ
subtitles.english: We just wanted to be loved, that's all.

subtitles.original: 知らない そういう言葉は期待するだけ無駄だし
subtitles.english: I don't know, words like that are just useless to hope for.

subtitles.original: 仕舞いには死角がわからないよね
subtitles.english: In the end, you don't even know where the blind spot is.

subtitles.original: たまらなくなるほど 求めて離さないで
subtitles.english: Desire me so much you can't stand it, and don't let go.

subtitles.english: A kiss isn't enough, just kill me instead.

subtitles.english: Dedication, immediately Addiction,

subtitles.original: さよなら また吐き出しで息が止まるのよ 今
subtitles.english: Goodbye, exhaling again, my breath stops now.

subtitles.english: It's not a game
